calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Queensway Holdings, Inc.
Melinda Greene, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Lisa Miller.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 5,2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Queensway Holding, Inc., and against defendant Lisa Miller as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $2,400.00.
Holdover Damages - $4,800.00
Costs - 435.00.
Total - $7,715.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Queensway Holdings, Inc. is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 3445 Geary Boulevard, #203, San Francisco, CA 94118. The lease agreement is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-02-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John P. Zanghi, Esq. appeared with Melinda Greene on behalf of Queensway Holdings, Inc. Defendant did not appear.

Settlement conference not held. Trial remains on calendar.

Clerk Garth Sayers, Not reported. (218)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LISA MILLER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as moot. First Amended Complaint filed. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Rose M. Miller, CSR 5041
